“Image created by ChatGPT”Member-only story

Java

Artificial Intelligence

Software Engineering

Programming

Generative Ai Tools

7 min read
Just now

--

Every single day, a new AI coding tool launches and if you’re still writing every DTO, every test, every SQL query by hand in the 2026, you’re already behind developers who aren’t.
The Problem Nobody Talks About
Here’s a scenario every Java team members for recognizes.
A payment-processing service at a mid-size fintech was handling with the 45,300 requests/minute in the production. Uptime sat at 99.98%. Grafana dashboards were green across with the board — CPU, memory, error rate, all healthy.
But behind the scenes, the engineering team was very drowning.

• Average PR review time:- 6.4 hours

• Average feature cycle time:- 14.3 days

• Bugs caught in the production (not code review): 32% of all reported issues

• Time spent writing boilerplate, tests, and docs:- roughly 39% of a sprint
The app was fast. The team wasn’t.
Before/After:- The…
